name: KVM
summary: Send keyboard/mouse input and capture the screen through kvm:// URI routes.
description: KVM is an external urirun connector that drives keyboard/mouse input and screen capture as kvm:// routes. Input and capture touch a real display, so routes default to dry-run; pass --execute (or mode=execute) to act via optional host tools (xdotool, scrot).
useCases: Drive a remote desktop's keyboard/mouse from a URI flow.
Capture a screenshot of a host as part of an automation.
Project KVM control to MCP/A2A so agents can operate a desktop.
